<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Renderers; use Illuminate\Contracts\Foundation\ExceptionRenderer; class IgnitionExceptionRenderer implements ExceptionRenderer { protected ErrorPageRenderer $errorPageHandler; public function __construct(ErrorPageRenderer $errorPageHandler) { $this->errorPageHandler = $errorPageHandler; } public function render($throwable) { ob_start(); $this->errorPageHandler->render($throwable); return ob_get_clean(); } }
